children.name: Tamoya
children.description: Tamoya — a genus of tamoyid box jellyfish in the family Tamoyidae.

children.name: Tamoya ancamori
children.description: Tamoya ancamori is a species of box jellyfish in the genus Tamoya..

children.name: Tamoya gargantua
children.description: Tamoya gargantua, commonly known as the warty sea wasp, is a venomous jellyfish in the genus Tamoya..

children.name: Tamoya haplonema
children.description: Tamoya haplonema is a species of box jellyfish in the genus Tamoya..

children.name: Tamoya ohboya
children.description: Tamoya ohboya, also known as the Bonaire banded box jellyfish, is a species of box jellyfish formally described in 2011..
